title: WASM toolchain productized
manager: The toolchain itself ships as WebAssembly — the Rust core plus the verb surface behind stdio and JS bindings — so FSL runs where agents actually run, with no install. This powers the playground and the editor, and more importantly it means an AI agent or a browser can run the full FSL toolchain (parse, check, run) without a native install, which is decisive for the AI-distribution era where the consumer is a model, not a developer with a dev environment.
cs: WASM = the Rust core + verb surface behind stdio/JS bindings; powers playground + editor; no-install toolchain; falls out of the v6 Rust implementation (WP10.3).
